title: ononis repens f. subspinosa
intro: Ononis repens f. subspinosa, also known as Restharrow, is a flowering plant in the legume family that has been used medicinally for centuries. It is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Restharrow include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate menstrual cramps, and even support wound healing. Herbal preparations of Restharrow can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
